standard.label: AlloFlow native test-prep editorial QA v5
standard.meaning: Editorial QA confirms cited answer support, one-best-answer structure, distinct and readable distractors, mechanical-padding rejection, clean text encoding, parallel-choice review, explanatory and option-specific feedback for every answer choice, template integrity, accessibility review declarations, and provenance.
standard.limitation: Editorial QA is not psychometric calibration, official exam approval, or independent licensed-psychologist validation.
